name: R5CharacteristicMethodForR4
title: Cross-version ValueSet R5.CharacteristicMethod for use in FHIR R4
description: This cross-version ValueSet represents content from `http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/characteristic-method|0.1.0` for use in FHIR R4.
purpose:
This value set is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
value set `http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/characteristic-method|0.1.0` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

*

* `http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/characteristic-method|0.1.0`
* `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/characteristic-method|4.3.0`

Note that all concepts are included in this cross-version definition because no concepts have compatible representations

The source and target value sets have the same number of active concepts (1).
FHIR ValueSet `http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/characteristic-method|0.1.0`, defined in FHIR R5 does not have any mapping to FHIR R4
